---
title: "Project Portfolio"
subtitle: "Selected engagements — anonymized — across financial services, manufacturing, AdTech, retail and FMCG."
toc: false
---

A decade of work sits behind these. From boardroom strategy at **BCG** to
production machine learning, the through-line is the same: frame the business
question sharply, solve it rigorously, and ship something that moves the number.

::: {.engagements}

:::: {.engagement}
::: {.engagement-icon}
<i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
:::
::: {.engagement-body}
[Financial services · Strategy (BCG)]{.tag}
[Strategy for a leading Polish bank and a major European insurer]{.headline}

As part of BCG, I worked hands-on with client data, ran research and client
interviews, and built the analyses and presentations behind strategic
recommendations delivered to senior stakeholders.
:::
::::

:::: {.engagement}
::: {.engagement-icon}
<i class="bi bi-cup-straw"></i>
:::
::: {.engagement-body}
[Manufacturing · Advanced analytics (BCG)]{.tag}
[Efficiency optimization for one of the world's largest brewers]{.headline}

I brought machine learning and advanced analytics into an operational
optimization engagement for a global brewer — translating messy production data
into measurable efficiency gains. Yes: I once optimized a brewery.
:::
::::

:::: {.engagement}
::: {.engagement-icon}
<i class="bi bi-broadcast"></i>
:::
::: {.engagement-body}
[AdTech · ML & experimentation]{.tag}
[Real-time bidding systems for leading AdTech companies]{.headline}

I advised and built for AdTech leaders: machine-learning models that buy mobile
display inventory in real time, paired with disciplined A/B testing and
reinforcement-learning approaches. The brief was always the same — solutions
that move profit, measurably.
:::
::::

:::: {.engagement}
::: {.engagement-icon}
<i class="bi bi-megaphone"></i>
:::
::: {.engagement-body}
[Retail · Causal inference]{.tag}
[Marketing measurement & optimization for a top global retailer]{.headline}

I designed a framework to measure marketing-campaign effectiveness and optimize
spend across channels — grounded in causal inference and proper experimentation
rather than last-click guesswork, so the client could trust where the next
dollar should go.
:::
::::

:::: {.engagement}
::: {.engagement-icon}
<i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i>
:::
::: {.engagement-body}
[FMCG / Product · Analytics]{.tag}
[Forecasting, audits & decision support across product and FMCG teams]{.headline}

Demand forecasting, data audits and quality assurance, A/B-test design, and
data-driven recommendations delivered straight to product and C-level
stakeholders — plus training corporate teams in applied AI.
:::
::::

:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Have a problem that needs this mix of strategy and data science?**
[Get in touch](mailto:michal.adamczyk@rtbhouse.com) or read more [about me](about.qmd).
